name: Sharkpedo 12'' Dive Toys - Sun Squad™
description:
Dive into fun with the Sharkpedo 12'' Dive Toys from Sun Squad™. This 12-inch toy is perfect for pool games, offering an exciting way to enhance underwater adventures. Made from durable material, it's designed to glide smoothly through water, making it a great choice for kids and adults alike. Lightweight and easy to handle, it's a fantastic addition to any pool day, promising hours of entertainment and friendly competition.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
